# insertRow

Inserts a row before the specified index.

Supported on:

*   [TableNode](/docs/plugins/api/TableNode/)

## Signature​

### insertRow(rowIndex: number): void

## Parameters​

### rowIndex​

Index of the new row. Must satisfy `0 <= rowIndex <= numRows`.
